content.headline: Professional Excellence in Team Leadership
content.body:
Building high-performing teams requires more than intuition. [CLM_003] demonstrates how QWL-guided, evidence-based actions help teams focus effort where impact is highest. [CLM_032] shows how action ranking should consider expected ROI and feasibility to avoid initiative overload.

Our approach combines academic rigor with practical application, delivering results that stand up to board-level scrutiny.
